subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Tal'atu'l-Hubb
subcodes.first_line: Countenance of love, we have recognized your longing for God in the pavilions of eternity, insofar as you drew near and attained
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا طلعه الحب قد عرفنا شوقک الی الله فی رفرف البقا علی قربک فی میادین
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @mystical themes, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
